control.description-key: LeanToolKit board grid — the master-leanboard tile wall. Renders each card snapshot INLINE (WebKit-safe, so SVG tiles stay small), in a configurable grid. Read mode: tap a tile to open its card. Edit mode: tap a tile to configure it, tap an empty slot to add a card, drag tiles to swap positions.

property.name: tilesJSON
property.description-key: The board slots joined to their card data: [{pos, cardId, cardType, title, svg}]. svg is raw svgExport markup (rendered inline) or a data image URI (rendered as an image). Tiles without a snapshot show a typed placeholder.

property.name: gridSize
property.description-key: Columns x rows, e.g. 3x3, or a bare column count. Empty = a near-square grid sized to fit the tiles. Grows rows as needed so every tile always fits.

property.name: editMode
property.description-key: Layout editing: tap a tile to configure it (action configure), tap an empty slot to add a card (action add), drag a tile onto another slot to swap positions (emits Layout). Off = read mode, where tapping a tile emits action open for navigation.

property.name: selectedSlotJSON
property.description-key: The tapped slot: {action: open | configure | add, pos, cardId, cardType, title, selectedAt}. open = navigate to the card (read mode); configure = open the composer for this slot; add = open the composer for the empty position. selectedAt changes on every tap so OnChange always fires.

property.name: layoutJSON
property.description-key: Emitted after a drag rearranges the tiles: {movedAt, slots:[{cardId, pos}]}. Persist the new positions into the board manifest in OnChange.

property.name: settingsJSON
property.description-key: Consolidated configuration: {title, prompts, readOnly, theme:{background,foreground,accent,legend,font}, config:{tilesJSON, gridSize, editMode}}. Settings are the base; a non-empty discrete text input overrides its key (boolean inputs merge with OR).

property.name: cardTitle
property.description-key: Optional title bar (e.g. the board name). Leave empty for no chrome at all.

property.name: prompts
property.description-key: Optional empty-state text shown while the board has no cards: plain text or a JSON array of strings.

property.name: backgroundColor
property.description-key: Board background colour (any CSS colour or hex). Default white.

property.name: foregroundColor
property.description-key: Text / line colour. Default rich black.

property.name: accentColor
property.description-key: Accent colour for drop targets and add-card hover. Default rich black.

property.name: fontFamily
property.description-key: Font family (or comma-separated font stack) for the chrome text.

property.name: readOnly
property.description-key: When true, the grid is display-only: no taps, no editing (wallboard mode).
